summary: An employee took a walk during work hours.
action: Encourage employees to take scheduled breaks to ensure productivity and safety.

original_incident: Worker slipped on oily surface near machinery area
summary: A worker experienced a slip due to an oily surface in the vicinity of the machinery area.
action: Implement regular cleaning protocols and install anti-slip mats in the machinery area.

original_incident: Worker cut hand while handling sharp metal sheet without gloves
summary: A worker sustained a cut on their hand while handling a sharp metal sheet without the use of gloves.
action: Implement mandatory use of personal protective equipment (PPE) when handling sharp materials and provide training on safe handling practices.

original_incident: Gas leak detected in confined space causing breathing issues to multiple workers
summary: A gas leak was identified in a confined area, resulting in respiratory difficulties for several employees.
action: Evacuate the area immediately, conduct a thorough investigation, and implement measures to repair the leak and ensure proper ventilation.

original_incident: Fire broke out in electrical panel room causing heavy smoke and evacuation
summary: A fire occurred in the electrical panel room, resulting in significant smoke and necessitating an evacuation of the premises.
action: Conduct a thorough investigation of the electrical panel and implement fire safety measures, including regular inspections and employee training on emergency procedures.
